title: Custom Provider Admin
notes:
- Methods under the `supabase.auth.admin.customProviders` namespace manage custom OIDC/OAuth providers programmatically. Requires a `secret` key.
- Custom providers are referenced with a `custom:` prefix when signing in (for example `custom:mycompany`), and are distinct from the OAuth 2.1 server clients managed through `supabase.auth.admin.oauth`.
